subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 796145512/260325647 is not a GRB
submitter: Daniel Fernandez at University of Alabama In Huntsville (UAH) <df0062@uah.edu>
body:
D. Fernandez (UAH) and L. Scotton (UAH) report on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 796145512/260325647 at 15:31:47.56 UT
on 25 March 2026, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to Local Particles due to SAA entry."
